project_type: Flutter mobile app (customer + delivery partner) with Next.js web backend
build_system: Flutter SDK with pubspec.yaml - no Flutter installed in sandbox, use static analysis only
test_framework: flutter_test with mocktail, widget tests in test/features/
build_command: Not available - Flutter SDK not installed in sandbox
test_command: Not available - Flutter SDK not installed in sandbox
verification_instructions: Since Flutter is not installed, verify code via: 1) Dart syntax validation where possible 2) Check imports and dependencies are consistent 3) Ensure no circular dependencies 4) Check that all referenced files exist
snapshot_or_generated_files: *.freezed.dart and *.g.dart files are generated by build_runner but already exist. Do NOT regenerate them. New freezed models will not have generated files created.
setup_instructions: Flutter SDK not available. Work with source files directly.
environment_constraints: Flutter SDK is NOT installed in this sandbox. Cannot run flutter build, flutter test, or dart analyze. All verification must be done through code review and static file checks. OPEN_INTERNET network mode allows package downloads but Flutter SDK is not present.
contribution_requirements: Commit on flutter-mobile-app branch. Follow existing patterns: Riverpod for state, GoRouter for navigation, Freezed for models, Dio for networking.
key_patterns: Screens take callback props (onTap, onSendOtp etc.) for navigation. Router creates screens and passes callbacks. Auth via StateNotifier. ApiClient wraps Dio. Product/Cart/Order repositories use ApiClient. Theme in core/theme/app_theme.dart. Models use Freezed with .freezed.dart and .g.dart parts.
directory_structure: mobile/lib/core/ (theme, router, providers, network, config, widgets), mobile/lib/features/ (auth, products, cart, checkout, orders, account, support, delivery - each with data/, domain/, presentation/ subdirs)
